name: polymath-connector-stripe
description: Stripe connector: MCP for Stripe API + refund-or-dispute-triage skill that classifies a charge/refund/dispute and produces a customer-comms-safe action plan.

stripeApiKey.title: Stripe restricted key
stripeApiKey.description: Restricted key (rk_...) with read-only scopes on the resources you need. Never use a secret key (sk_...).

stripeMode.title: Stripe mode
stripeMode.description: 'live' or 'test'. Default 'test'; explicit 'live' required for production triage.
